/CAL:MOTION TO REDUCE TO MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PROP 47,/X:  GOOD CAUSE APPEARING AND IT BEING STIPULATED BY THE PARTIES THAT PETITIONER MEETS THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN 1170,18(F), IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT:PETITIONER'S FELONY CONVICTION ON 7-7-2010 FOR VIOLATION OF SECTION 496(A) OF THE CALIFORNIA PENAL CODE, BE DESIGNATED AS A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE '1170,18(G),  ANY FELONY CONVICTION THAT IS DESIGNATED AS A MISDEMEANOR UNDER '1170,18(G)SHALL BE CONSIDERED A MISDEMEANOR FOR ALL PURPOSES, EXCEPT THAT SUCHDESIGNATION SHALL NOT PERMIT THAT PERSON TO OWN, POSSESS, OR HAVE IN HIS OR HER CUSTODY OR CONTROL ANY FIREARM OR PREVENT HIS OR HER CONVICTION UNDERCHAPTER 2 (COMMENCING WITH SECTION 29800) OF DIVISION 9 OF TITLE 4 OF PART6, HAVING BEEN CONVICTED OF A MISDEMEANOR, AND HAVING COMPLETED HIS SENTENCE FOR THIS CONVICTION, PETITIONER IS THEREFORE NOT SUBJECT TO SUPERVISIONBY THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION,MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/

/CAL SENTENCING/MTR-DA OR APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVK/AJW/CH1 SP  16M:L /X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 70 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,69SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF  139  DAYS,/4019HALF/ DNACOMP/VF5:200/PROBFINE1/PAR/CDC/
